name: pan_firewall
explanation: pan_firewall is a vendor logs-only tile for Palo Alto Networks firewall syslog ingestion. The spec contains only a `logs` template (TCP listener on port 10518 by default) and ships no Agent metric check beyond `__init__.py`. Setup requires the operator to configure PAN-OS syslog forwarding via Device > Server Profiles, define custom log formats for each log type, and point the firewall at the Agent host. There is no upstream service the Agent can discover; the listener is purely a passive sink.
notes: Logs-only vendor tile (pattern N analogue). The fixed port 10518 is the Agent-side listener, not a service to probe.
